cmd_desc_mypermissions: Check your permission level in this guild.
cmd_desc_listguildadmins: List configured guild admins for this server.
cmd_desc_help: Show all available commands or details for a specific command.
cmd_desc_getserverlist: Get a list of all servers the bot is in.
cmd_desc_getinfo: Get detailed information about the bot.
cmd_desc_addadmin: Add a user as a global bot admin.
cmd_desc_update: Download the latest code from GitHub and update files; restart the bot to apply the changes.
cmd_desc_removeguildadmin: Remove a user from the guild admin list.
cmd_desc_guildpermissions: View all permission levels in this guild (guild owner only).
cmd_desc_addguildadmin: Add a user as an admin for this specific guild.
cmd_desc_setupvoice: Interactive setup for private voice channels.
cmd_desc_setprivatevoice: Set a voice channel as the trigger for creating private channels.
cmd_desc_removeprivatevoice: Remove the private voice trigger channel setting.
cmd_desc_setlogchannel: Set which text channel receives edit/delete logs.
cmd_desc_r6opsroll: Roll a random Rainbow Six operator with weapons and gadget (optionally specify att/def).
cmd_desc_transfervoice: Transfer ownership of your private voice channel to another member.
transfervoice_no_channel: ❌ You don't own a private voice channel.
transfervoice_self: ❌ You can't transfer ownership to yourself.
transfervoice_target_not_in_channel: ❌ {user} must be in your channel ({channel}) to receive ownership.
transfervoice_forbidden: ❌ Missing permissions to update the channel.
cmd_desc_getlang: Show the current guild language and available languages.
cmd_desc_setlang: Set the language for this server.
setupvoice_description: Follow the steps below to set up private voice channels for your server.
no_guild: ❌ This command can only be used in a server!
no_permission_admin: ❌ You need administrator permissions to use this command!
no_trigger_set: ❌ No trigger channel set. Use `{prefix}setprivatevoice <channel_id>` to set one.
no_voice_channels: ⚠️ No voice channels found. Please create one first!
setprivate_success_desc: Successfully set **{channel_name}** as the trigger channel!
addguildadmin_success: Successfully added **{user}** as an admin for this server!
language_set_success: ✅ Language set to {lang} for this server.
setlogchannel_not_text: ❌ The specified channel must be a text channel.
setlogchannel_invalid: ❌ Invalid channel. Make sure the bot can see it.
setrollerchannel_not_text: ❌ The specified channel must be a text channel.
setrollerchannel_success: ✅ Roller channel set to {channel}. Roller results will be sent via DM.
setrollermode_no_channel: ❌ Roller channel is not configured yet. Use setrollerchannel first.
roller_dm_sent: ✅ I sent you a DM to roll.
roller_dm_failed: ❌ I couldn't DM you. Please enable DMs from server members and try again.
warn_missing_permission: [WARN] Missing permission to send log to channel {log_channel_id} in guild {guild_id}
no_guild_admins: ❌ This server has no guild admins!
listguildadmins_no_admins: This server has no configured guild admins.
listguildadmins_howto: Use `{prefix}addguildadmin @user` to add a guild admin.
listguildadmins_note_value: Guild admins can use management commands. Server administrators and bot owners also have management permissions.
owner_only: This command can only be used by bot owners
must_be_in_guild: This command can only be used in a server!
guild_owner_only: This command can only be used by the server owner
require_guild_admin: This command requires server administrator permissions
owner_desc: Highest level - full access to all bot commands
guild_owner_desc: Server owner - full access to server administration
admin_desc: Bot administrator - can manage bot configuration
user_desc: Regular user - access to basic commands
pv_how_it_works: When users join {channel}, they will automatically get their own private voice channel!
pv_trigger_missing: ⚠️ Trigger channel is set but no longer exists.
pv_set_instructions:
To set up private voice channels, use: {prefix}setprivatevoice <channel_id>
Or use the interactive setup: {prefix}setupvoice
pv_no_trigger: ❌ No trigger channel is currently set.
pv_provide_voice_only: ❌ Please provide a voice channel, not a text channel!
pv_invalid_channel_id: ❌ Invalid channel ID! Please provide a valid voice channel ID.
pv_channel_not_found: ❌ Channel not found! Make sure the channel exists in this server.
pv_not_voice_channel: ❌ The specified channel is not a voice channel!
pv_configured_desc: Successfully set {channel_name} as the trigger channel!
pv_what_happens_bullets: • Users who join {channel} will get their own private channel
• The owner will have full control over their channel
• The channel will be automatically deleted when empty
• If a user already has a channel, they'll be moved to it
pv_tip_text: You can rename the trigger channel to something like '➕ Create Private Channel' to make it clear to users!
pv_no_trigger_info: ℹ️ No trigger channel is currently set.
pv_removed_success: ✅ Private voice trigger channel has been removed.
addguildadmin_desc: Successfully added {user} as an admin for this server!
addguildadmin_permissions_desc: This user can now use admin commands in this server.
setupvoice_what_is: Private voice channels are temporary voice channels created when a user joins a designated 'trigger' channel. Each user gets their own private channel which is deleted when empty.
setupvoice_steps:
1) Choose a voice channel as the trigger
2) Users who join will get a private channel
3) Private channels are created in the same category
4) Channels delete when empty
setupvoice_no_voice_channels: Your server has no voice channels. Please create one first!
setupvoice_tip_value:
• Create a channel named '➕ Create Private Channel'
• Put it at the top of the voice category
• Set channel user limit to 0
• Private channels inherit category permissions
serverlist_no_servers: Bot is not in any servers.
permstruct_desc: Overview of all permission levels in this server
perm_levels_explanation:
**Guild Owner** → All permissions, including `guild_owner` commands
**Guild Admins** → Can use `guild_admin` commands
**Discord Admins** → Can use `guild_admin` and `admin` commands
**All Users** → Can use `user` commands
r6_no_operator_found: ❌ No operator data found! Please try again later.
r6_map_desc: Roll a random Rainbow Six map and mode
r6_ops_desc: Roll a random Rainbow Six operator loadout
r6_map_no_data: ❌ No map data found! Please try again later.
